languages.text: "Вот уж еле нагнали вас! Вы явно торопитесь на встречу с Богом-Императором, Ваша Светлость. Полковник Батошски решил отправить вам на помощь пару ребят — и вот они мы".
"We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж еле нагнали вас! Вы явно торопитесь на встречу с Богом-Императором, Ваша Светлость. Полковник Батошски решил отправить вам на помощь пару ребят — и вот они мы".

traits.locale_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a couple of us to help you, so here we are."
"We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."
"Ha, we barely caught up. You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a couple of us to help you, so here we are."
"We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a couple of us to help you, so here we are."
"We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

languages.text: 「はは、やっと追いついた。神皇帝に会うために急いでいるようだな、貴方様。」バトシュスキー大佐は、貴方様を助けるために、私達を数人送ることにしたんだ。
languages.original_text: "Ha, we barely caught up. You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a couple of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: 「はは、やっと追いついた。神皇帝に会うために急いでいるようだな、貴方様。」バトシュスキー大佐は、貴方様を助けるために、私達を数人送ることにしたんだ。

languages.text: "Zar zor yetiştik. Belli ki Tanrı İmparator'la tanışmak için aceleniz var {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Albay Batoshski size yardım etmesi için birkaçımızı göndermeye karar verdi, işte karşınızdayız."
languages.original_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: "Zar zor yetiştik. Belli ki Tanrı İmparator'la tanışmak için aceleniz var {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Albay Batoshski size yardım etmesi için birkaçımızı göndermeye karar verdi, işte karşınızdayız."

languages.text: «¡Apenas hemos conseguido alcanzarl{mf|e|a}! Debe de tener mucha prisa por reunirse con el Dios Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El coronel Batoshski ha decidido enviarle algo de ayuda, y aquí estamos».
languages.original_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: «¡Apenas hemos conseguido alcanzarl{mf|e|a}! Debe de tener mucha prisa por reunirse con el Dios Emperador, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El coronel Batoshski ha decidido enviarle algo de ayuda, y aquí estamos».

languages.text: “我们差点没追上您。看来您真是急着去见神皇啊，大人。巴托什斯基上校决定派我们几个来帮您，所以我们就来了。”
languages.original_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: “我们差点没追上您。看来您真是急着去见神皇啊，大人。巴托什斯基上校决定派我们几个来帮您，所以我们就来了。”

languages.text: « Nous avons eu du mal à vous rattraper ! Vous semblez {mf|pressé|pressée} de rejoindre l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. Nous sommes venus vous prêter main-forte à la demande du colonel Batoshski. »
languages.original_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons eu du mal à vous rattraper ! Vous semblez {mf|pressé|pressée} de rejoindre l'Empereur-Dieu, Votre Seigneurie. Nous sommes venus vous prêter main-forte à la demande du colonel Batoshski. »

languages.text: "Wir hatten Mühe, Euch einzuholen. Ihr habt es offenbar eilig, den Gottimperator zu treffen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Colonel Batoshski hat beschlossen, einige von uns als Unterstützung zu schicken, und hier sind wir."
languages.original_text: "We could barely catch up with you! You're obviously in a hurry to meet the God-Emperor, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Colonel Batoshski decided to send a few of us to help you, so here we are."

traits.locale_text: "Wir hatten Mühe, Euch einzuholen. Ihr habt es offenbar eilig, den Gottimperator zu treffen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Colonel Batoshski hat beschlossen, einige von uns als Unterstützung zu schicken, und hier sind wir."
